Endless Dodge

by

First Game Jam

While I have attempted doing a game jam before, it didn't work out. This was the first game jam where I was able to plan, implement, and publish on time. With me only finding out about it the same day the deadline was happening and with other responsibilities the same day, I only had 5 hours to do it. Thankfully, I was able to think of an idea for the game in the early morning, which ended up being a simple dodge the enemies while they attack the player idea. While not fundamentally unique, with the limited time, it worked perfectly for the game jam.

Entry

This was the summited entry I did for gamebridge 2026 game jam.
